title: Checklist Templates
excerpt: Would really like to see the ability to create ‘Checklist’ templates (ability to select pre-determined checklists). Currently, we are copy and pasting checklists we’ve previously used. Thank you!

posts.author: fionnaon (Fionna)
posts.cookedHtml: Would really like to see the ability to create ‘Checklist’ templates (ability to select pre-determined checklists). Currently, we are copy and pasting checklists we’ve previously used. Thank you!

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: That’s a great suggestion! Have you put it on the feature suggestion board? Feature requests - monday Community Forum
